title: cracca × smallii
intro: Cracca × smallii, also known as Small's cracca, is a hybrid plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is characterized by its small, yellowish-green flowers and its ability to thrive in moist environments. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Cracca × smallii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to reap its health benefits, which include reducing pain, inflammation, and improving digestion.
